summary:
Feature: DEEP AUDIT: hx-tile — Enterprise Component Quality Review

## Deep Audit V2: hx-tile

**Comprehensive enterprise-grade quality audit** of the `hx-tile` component.

### Audit Dimensions
1. **Design Tokens** — All colors, spacing, typography use `--hx-*` tokens. No hardcoded values.
2. **Accessibility** — WCAG 2.1 AA compliance. ARIA roles, keyboard navigation, screen reader support.
3. **Functionality** — All public API works correctly. Edge cases handled. Interactive/selectable states.
